src: LAN Orchestrated Key Infiltrator - Autonomous network recon payload for the Hak5 WiFi Pineapple Pager — inspired by Bjorn, rebuilt with themes, web UI, and expanded functionality.
ja: Hak5 WiFi Pineapple Pager向けの自律ネットワーク偵察ペイロード「LAN Orchestrated Key Infiltrator」。Bjornにインスパイアされ、テーマ、Web UI、拡張機能を追加して再構築。
